allow:

Agent System Features:
- Agent Global Hub \(unified config for Claude/Kilo/Antigravity\)
- Memory Bank system for project context
- Obsidian bi-directional sync
- Git hooks for Memory Bank reminders
- Shell aliases for workflows \(mbk, mbc, ag, cdc, etc.\)

- Cross-project knowledge base
- Token usage analytics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
